note: MECHANICS TEST RUN ONLY — executed on a Saturday (market closed). curr_price/prev_daily/sma200 reflect Friday 2026-07-10's frozen close; TradingView's live quote was not moving. Intraday pmh/today_hod computed from 5-minute bars (not 1-minute as originally specified) because a 1-minute data_get_ohlcv call is hard-capped at the last ~300 bars (~5 hours) regardless of requested count or chart_scroll_to_date, which cannot reach back to 4:00am ET premarket start. Under frozen weekend data, curr_price always equals the previous session's own close, which by definition can never exceed that same session's own high — so daily_breakout is structurally guaranteed false for every ticker in this run, independent of any real setup. These results should not be treated as live trading signals.
